title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that provides Git-style version control workflows including branches, commits, diffs, merges, and pull requests for structured data. It addresses collaboration and data versioning challenges in ML datasets, test data, configurations, and production systems. Dolt uses Prolly Trees internally to efficiently manage schema and data changes.
